name: border-beam
title: Border Beam
description: Animated border beam effect using CSS Houdini @property and conic-gradient. Supports border (sm/md) and line (bottom-only traveling glow) size variants with per-component theme control (dark/light/auto). Refactored from Jakubantalik/border-beam (MIT) into static, registry-native CSS — no runtime style injection, no npm dependency.
